title: A soldier from 2026 dropped into Ancient Rome

shots.voiceover: You're a special forces soldier in 2026. One second you're on patrol. The next, you're face down in cold mud.
shots.prompt: a modern special-forces soldier in 2026 multicam fatigues, face down in cold mud, just waking up, disoriented, dawn light, photorealistic, cinematic, shallow depth of field, 9:16 vertical, ultra realistic, 4K

shots.voiceover: You look up. Stone aqueducts. Men in armor. This is Rome, seventy-nine A D. And you do not belong here.
shots.prompt: low-angle POV of towering ancient Roman aqueducts and stone city, Roman legionaries in armor in the distance, dramatic morning light, photorealistic

shots.voiceover: So let's run it. How long does a modern soldier actually survive in the ancient world?
Your rifle has thirty rounds. After that, it's a four pound paperweight. No factory here makes more.
shots.prompt: close-up of a modern soldier's hands checking a rifle magazine, worried expression, ancient stone wall background, firelight, photorealistic, cinematic, 9:16 vertical, 4K

shots.voiceover: The first legionaries who find you don't see a soldier. They see a stranger in strange clothes. A spy. Or a demon.
shots.prompt: Roman legionaries surrounding and pointing spears at a kneeling modern soldier, torches, tense standoff, night, photorealistic, cinematic

shots.voiceover: You can't explain. You don't speak Latin. And I come in peace means nothing to a centurion with a drawn blade.
shots.prompt: a stern Roman centurion in detailed armor drawing a gladius, extreme close-up, cold determined eyes, dark dramatic lighting, photorealistic

shots.voiceover: But the sword is not what kills you.
shots.prompt: Pure black background. Bold white text: THE SWORD WON'T KILL YOU. Smaller gold text below: SOMETHING ELSE WILL.

shots.voiceover: Because the real enemy isn't the legion. It's the water.
No antibiotics. No clean water. A small cut gets infected, and in two weeks you're gone. Exactly like half their own army.
shots.prompt: murky ancient water well and clay cups, dim light, ominous mood, a sick soldier lying on a cot in shadow, photorealistic, cinematic

shots.voiceover: Your real edge? You know germ theory. You know to boil the water, to clean a wound, to keep waste away from camp.
shots.prompt: a modern soldier boiling water over a fire in a Roman camp at night, focused expression, other Romans watching curiously, photorealistic, cinematic, 9:16 vertical, 4K

shots.voiceover: Play it right, and a soldier who never gets sick starts to look like something more than human.
shots.prompt: a lone figure standing tall and healthy among kneeling, awed Roman soldiers, golden light breaking through clouds, epic mood, photorealistic, cinematic

shots.voiceover: That's how a man with no army becomes a legend. Knowledge beats numbers.
So. Modern soldier, ancient Rome. Do you survive a month? Drop your plan in the comments.
shots.prompt: a modern soldier looking directly at camera, faint confident half-smile, firelit Roman camp behind him at night, photorealistic, cinematic, 9:16 vertical, 4K
